## Module details

- **ID:** M__
- **Title:**
- **Domain:**
- **Estimated hours:**
- **Linear issue:**

## Content checklist

- [ ] MDX frontmatter complete (id, title, domain, objectives, topics)
- [ ] All learning objectives written at correct Bloom's level
- [ ] Main prose content complete
- [ ] Code examples tested and accurate
- [ ] Comparison tables included where appropriate
- [ ] ANS-C01 exam tips highlighted
- [ ] Knowledge check questions authored (min 5)
- [ ] Content reviewed by SME

## Persona coverage

- [ ] Student path appropriately signposted
- [ ] Practitioner deep-dive sections included
- [ ] Teacher facilitator notes added
